claims.summary: The live regulator uses PI dynamics with explicit filtering and bounded actuation.
claims.disposition: Verify the active regulator path and current coefficient ownership from source and tests.

claims.summary: Integrator leak and actuator-aware anti-windup should prevent unbounded persistence under saturation.
claims.disposition: Verify leak, saturation bleed, conditional integration, and anti-windup regressions.

claims.summary: Semantic and dynamic viscosity candidates are review evidence rather than active control.
claims.disposition: Verify those surfaces are unwired and route pressure, viscosity, and hunting comparison through sandbox evidence.

claims.summary: Wiring viscosity or changing PI coefficients would alter live Minime regulation.
claims.disposition: Hold viscosity coupling and PI coefficient changes behind exact Mike/operator approval.
